name: Does insurance cover lawyer malpractice from ChatGPT?
description: Typically yes; file claim via lawyer.

mainEntity.name: Does insurance cover lawyer malpractice from ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically yes; file claim via lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually yes, if policy includes errors. Context: Professional liability covers AI if verified properly. Key factors: Exclusions for intentional acts. Practical guidance: Lawyer's insurer handles claims; notify promptly. Most policies updated.
